existing_features.title: Add a `useGetVendorRatingSummary(vendorId)` React Query hook in `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` that calls the new `getVendorRatingSummary` backend query, replacing any frontend-side aggregation of raw review data for rating summaries. Update `VendorCard.tsx`, `VendorStorePage.tsx`, and `VendorReviewsSection.tsx` to use this hook.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a dedicated backend query function `getVendorRatingSummary(vendorId: Principal)` that returns a structured rating summary for a given vendor, including average star rating (Float), total review count (Nat), and a breakdown of counts per star level (1–5). This should replace or complement the current approach where rating data is aggregated on the frontend from raw reviews.
